items.acceptanceCriteria: Hazards don't exist around elevating/lifting equipment and it is safe to carry out inspection and load test
Load test procedures for the specified equipment are reviewed
The elevating/lifting equipment is painted safety yellow
The elevating/lifting equipment is painted safety yellow-and-black stripes on offshore facilities
Rated capacity of the elevating/lifting equipment is marked (Arabic & English)
Operator is certified and licensed
Elevating/lifting equipment has been built to the applicable/related standard(s)
Elevating/lifting equipment history records are checked
All safety devices are provided as per applicable standards and design
All locking devices are as per applicable standards and design
All limit devices are as per applicable standards and design
Manufacturer's load test certificate for new/repaired equipment is provided
Initial inspection is performed using applicable SAIC
Proof load test is verified (e.g. 125%, 200%, etc.)
Rated loads are as per applicable standards and/or design
Sling, shackles and below the hook lifting device condition are checked
Witness load test as per load test procedures
Post load test inspection using applicable SAIC is performed
Elevating/lifting equipment design/modifications calculations are checked
Allowable deflection limits are verified against design specs.
Boom is fully retracted and extended to its maximum length of________ meters (feet)
Operational test through all configurations are conducted (e.g. extend boom, telescoping, hoisting, etc.)
Elevating/lifting equipment stability and integrity at extreme operating conditions are verified
The elevating/lifting equipment has the manufacturer test certification

for repairs, modifications or alterations Repairs, modifications and/or alterations are carried out to manufacturer, applicable international standards and/or Saudi Aramco standards NOTE: Load Test shall not proceed until any Failed
items.referenceStandard: G.I.7.030 & Applicable ASME/ANIS items are corrected.
